Term Sheet for Proposed Strategic Investment in NovaSagar Technologies Limited (the Issuer) by Vistron Ventures Private Limited (the Investor), India.
Structure: Preferential allotment of 12,000,000 equity shares at INR 142 per share (aggregate INR 170.4 crore) and a secondary purchase of 3% from SuryaKamal Holdings LLP, capping post-deal holding at 19.9%.
Pricing: Floor price to comply with SEBI ICDR Regulations (26-week/2-week VWAP), with any premium payable in cash; no warrants or convertibles.
Approvals and disclosure: Board approval and shareholder special resolution required; intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 to be made to NSE and BSE as soon as possible and not later than 24 hours from the Board decision.
UPSI: Until disseminated on the stock exchange websites, this term sheet and any negotiations constitute Unpublished Price Sensitive Information under SEBI (PIT) Regulations; selective disclosure is prohibited and wall-crossing acknowledgments are required.
Trading window/blackout: The Issuer’s trading window shall remain closed from circulation of this document until 48 hours after dissemination of the Reg 30 outcome; pre-clearance and contra trade restrictions apply per the Issuer’s Code of Conduct.
Materiality: Disclosure timing and content will be assessed against the Issuer’s board-approved materiality policy (including quantitative thresholds and event-based triggers) and issuer-relative impact on turnover, profitability, or net worth.
Public references not UPSI: The Issuer’s FY2023–24 audited results press release dated 30 May 2025 and the widely disseminated corporate announcement on a Bengaluru R&D lease filed on 18 January 2026 are already public and should not be treated as UPSI.
Adversarial clarification: A general industry article about semiconductor incentives quoted in press last week is not an Issuer update and must not be used to infer trading cues.
DPDPA compliance: PAN/GSTIN details may be processed for KYC with explicit consent; Aadhaar, if voluntarily provided, shall be masked/verified via offline XML only and not retained; no data of a child (under 18) will be processed without verifiable guardian consent.
Investor KYC (fictional): Vistron Ventures Private Limited, PAN PQRST9876L, GSTIN 22PQRST9876L1Z2, Registered Office: 88/3 Chaitanya Park, South Phase, New Lakshmi Nagar, Bengaluru 560128, Karnataka, India.
Data handling: Personal data will be stored in India, used solely for this transaction, and deleted or anonymised within 90 days of closing or termination; data principals may withdraw consent via dpo@novasagartech.in.
Controls: Parties shall maintain a structured digital database of insiders as per PIT Regulations; onward sharing only on a strict need-to-know basis under NDA and subject to Chinese walls and clean team protocols.
Conditions subsequent: In-principle approvals from stock exchanges, filing of allotment return, and if any change results in crossing 25% voting rights, an open offer under SEBI (SAST) Regulations shall be triggered with a public announcement; long stop date 90 days from signing.
Contact: Ms. Kavya Daramith, Company Secretary & Compliance Officer, NovaSagar Technologies Limited, email compliance@novasagartech.in; for Investor, Mr. Rohen Veladi, Director, Vistron Ventures Pvt Ltd, email rohen.veladi@vistronventures.in.
